opportunities.label: Online Scheduling Automation
opportunities.signal: Boise Air Masters has no booking button, no contact form, and is phone-only.
opportunities.observation: After-hours HVAC calls in Boise go unanswered, sending leads directly to competitors.
opportunities.fix: Deploy AI-powered 24/7 scheduling widget to capture after-hours Boise service requests automatically.

opportunities.label: Review Response Automation
opportunities.signal: 4.2 rating across 58 reviews with no detected owner response patterns on Google.
opportunities.observation: Unresponded reviews signal neglect to prospective Boise customers researching HVAC options.
opportunities.fix: Automate personalized Google review responses using AI trained on HVAC service context.

opportunities.label: Maintenance Reminder Automation
opportunities.signal: No CRM or email marketing tools detected and no recurring revenue signals on site.
opportunities.observation: Boise's harsh winters and hot summers create ideal recurring tune-up demand being left uncaptured.
opportunities.fix: Automate seasonal maintenance reminder campaigns to existing customers before Boise peak HVAC seasons.
